description: op-to-op latency CI golden (Blackhole, bh_p150_perf). Runs under TT_METAL_PROFILER_ACCUMULATE=1 so the per-program L1->DRAM profiler dump does not land in the op2op gap (reviewer request: otherwise the gap is inflated by profiler writeout). ARMED: golden = center of two accumulate CI runs (official_op2op_us 2.103/2.102 -> 2.10; pack_to_unpack_op2op_us 4.605/4.604 -> 4.60), tolerance_pct=10 (BH is near-identical run-to-run, so 10% is already generous headroom while still catching real regressions; revisit as more runs land). Pre-accumulate device-profiler baselines were official_op2op_us=2.069, pack_to_unpack_op2op_us=4.255.
